name: Awara Natural
tagline: Eco-friendly latex hybrid at an accessible price point
description: The Awara Natural Hybrid combines organic Dunlop latex with individually wrapped coils for a supportive, responsive, and eco-conscious sleep experience. It offers the durability of latex with the support of coils at a more affordable price than most organic competitors. Plus, every purchase supports tree-planting initiatives.
seoTitle: Awara Natural Hybrid 2026: The Best Affordable Organic Mattress?
seoDescription: Explore Awara's eco-friendly latex hybrid mattress. Organic materials, lifetime warranty, and tree planting. See why it's a top choice!
